title: watchbehind
description: adds two scary mobs to the game.
body:
Watch Behind: A Subtle Horror Mod on Modrinth

Watch Behind is a minimalist horror mod available on Modrinth that transforms ordinary Minecraft gameplay into a slow-burning psychological experience. Instead of relying on loud jumpscares or obvious monsters, the mod plays with one of the oldest human fears: the feeling of being watched. As you explore caves, forests, or even your own base, the world begins to feel slightly wrong. Sounds occur where nothing should be, shadows linger too long, and you may sense a presence just outside your field of view.

What makes Watch Behind effective is its restraint. The mod does not constantly attack the player. It waits. It observes. This creates tension that grows naturally over time, making even familiar locations feel unsafe. Players often find themselves turning around repeatedly, questioning whether something moved or if it was only their imagination.

The mod integrates smoothly with vanilla gameplay and other mods, making it ideal for survival worlds or horror-focused modpacks. There are no complex mechanics to learn, only paranoia to manage. Watch Behind proves that horror does not need to be loud or violent to be powerful. Sometimes, the quiet fear of what might be behind you is far worse.
